reason: Ready for review: additive registry metadata, result-envelope helpers, lazy built-in loading, engine+parser contracts, seam tests

review.reference: Review passed: additive registry metadata (question/family/missing_input_hint/caveat_summary all optional with safe defaults, family validated against RESULT_FAMILIES); core contract (name/domain/inputs/output/priority/auto_safe/revision/fn) intact and lab-ratio registrations unchanged (3 signals, no churn). Four distinct serializable result envelopes (StatusResult/TrendResult/BaselineComparisonResult/ChangeAroundDateResult) plus MissingInputReport, with freshness state, caveat lists, refusal states, counts/point lists; no catch-all and no MCP import. Lazy loading via static _BUILTIN_SIGNAL_MODULES list, no fs scanning; verified import premura.engine keeps REGISTRY empty and lab_ratios out of sys.modules until a public helper runs. Engine CONTRACT.md shipped (belongs/evidence/caveats/must-not-claim/tests-review) and linked from parsers/CONTRACT.md; no plugin-system or profile-precondition claims. 13/13 seam tests pass, 24/24 engine-keyed tests pass; diff touches only the six owned files.

Ready for review: four descriptive signals with freshness/gap/carried-forward honesty. NOTE: descriptive_signals not yet in WP01-owned _BUILTIN_SIGNAL_MODULES; one-line registration follow-up needed for production auto-discovery (tests register explicitly and prove compute() resolution).

review.reference: Review passed: 4 descriptive signals (resting_hr_status [status], resting_hr_trend/steps_trend/weight_trend [trend]) implemented and LIVE via engine.compute. Independently confirmed: _ensure_builtin_signals_loaded() registers all four (no KeyError through compute), and import stays lazy (REGISTRY empty, module not imported on import). Wiring is the sanctioned one-line addition of premura.engine.descriptive_signals to WP01-owned _BUILTIN_SIGNAL_MODULES. Shared _query.py helpers (load_metric_policy/latest_usable_value/ordered_window) reused by all signals, no duplicated warehouse logic, no dead helpers. Freshness honesty verified: stale values flagged STALE never relabeled current. steps (missing_data_policy:none) yields ZERO imputed points -> gaps stay gaps; carry-forward gated centrally on policy.carries_forward so steps cannot inherit LOCF. weight LOCF carry-forward gated on validity_window so 20-day-old reading is STALE/gaps not current. Tests cover status current/stale/no-value, trend clear/sparse/insufficient, steps gaps, weight carried-forward+stale; driven through engine.compute on temp DuckDB. Tests: descriptive_signals 11 pass, engine 8 pass, -k engine 35 pass, full suite 106 pass. No out-of-scope changes.
